text: I can do all things through Christ who strengthens me.
For I know the plans I have for you, declares the Lord, plans for welfare and not for evil, to give you a future and a hope.
And we know that in all things God works for the good of those who love Him, who have been called according to His purpose.
Fear not, for I am with you; be not dismayed, for I am your God; I will strengthen you and help you.
Be strong and courageous. Do not be frightened, for the Lord your God is with you wherever you go.
Even though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, I will fear no evil, for You are with me.
Taste and see that the Lord is good; blessed is the one who takes refuge in Him.
Trust in the Lord with all your heart and lean not on your own understanding; in all your ways acknowledge Him, and He will make your paths straight.
May the God of hope fill you with all joy and peace as you trust in Him.
The steadfast love of the Lord never ceases; His mercies never come to an end; they are new every morning; great is Your faithfulness.
In the world you will have tribulation. But take heart; I have overcome the world.
For God gave us a spirit not of fear but of power and love and self-control.
Cast all your anxieties on Him, because He cares for you.
Rejoice in hope, be patient in tribulation, be constant in prayer.
Let us not grow weary of doing good, for in due season we will reap, if we do not give up.
Those who hope in the Lord will renew their strength. They will soar on wings like eagles.
This is the day that the Lord has made; let us rejoice and be glad in it.
Let us hold fast the confession of our hope without wavering, for He who promised is faithful.
He will wipe away every tear from their eyes. There will be no more death or mourning or crying or pain.
I keep my eyes always on the Lord. With Him at my right hand, I will not be shaken.
The Lord gives strength to His people; the Lord blesses His people with peace.
Delight yourself in the Lord, and He will give you the desires of your heart.
Consider Him who endured such opposition from sinners, so that you will not grow weary and lose heart.
The fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace, patience, kindness, goodness, faithfulness, gentleness, self-control.
Be strong and courageous. He will never leave you nor forsake you.
